## Usage Rules

When generating Peblla product UI visuals:

1. **Reference the corresponding Figma design** for colors, layout, typography, and button styles
2. Ensure output is visually consistent with the actual product UI
3. Use the correct design system per product (see [UI Design System](./ui-design-system.md))
4. Fill mockups with realistic restaurant data, not placeholder text
